name: Chicken-Spaghetti Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Break spaghetti pieces in half.
2. Cook according to package directions; drain (should have about 2 cups).
3. In a large saucepan, cook bacon, onion and garlic until bacon is crisp.
4. Blend in flour. Add undrained tomatoes, soup and milk.
5. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
6. Add shredded American cheese, stirring until melted.
7. Stir in cooked spaghetti, cubed chicken, and thawed peas.
8. Turn into a 2 1/2-qt casserole.
9. Top with parmesan.
10. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 45 minutes.
